case_title: DORA KALIKA VS. DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KALIKA, DORA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES C/O OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-24-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APPEARS WITH RUSSIAN INTERPRETER MIKHAIL LULSKIY. DIANE MOREAU APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2016 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY KALIKA, DORA AS TO DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES C/O OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KALIKA, DORA AS TO DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES C/O OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KALIKA, DORA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES C/O OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
